title: Attribute Swapping Fix
description: Simple drop-in mod to stop Attribute Swapping / Breach Swapping on Fabric
body:
# AttributeSwappingFix

## Description

Stops Attribute Swapping / Breach Swapping on Fabric   
Plz fix Mojang

## Try it out
`hardcoreanarchy.gay`   (Deathban Anarchy)  
`sky.hardcoreanarchy.gay`   (Skyblock Anarchy)  

## Support

[Support discord here!]( https://discord.gg/3tP3Tqu983)
